extraction.one_line_summary: BODZANA Filippo won from breakaway sprint on home roads in Veneto, while ROGLIČ Primož attacked on final climb to seize 2nd GC from ALMEIDA João by 11 seconds
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC attacked final climb only after VINE positioning error on descent created tactical opportunity, suggesting calculated risk-taking when team support fractures.
INEOS deployed THOMAS teammates early on third-from-last climb, leaving him isolated with 2 climbs remaining—premature pacemaking cost protection.
Israel Premier Tech animated race with multiple riders but PINO/GANNA/FRIGO forced to chase each other, fragmenting team strength in breakaway.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primož: positive: hung at back of group fueling abandonment speculation, then attacked to steal 11-second GC gap when rivals isolated
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: lost all teammates with 2 climbs remaining but never cracked, suggesting either excellent form or rivals' limited attacking
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: dropped 11 seconds to second place while trying to conserve position, passive tactics backfired with VINE support error
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: moved up GC despite losing time, suggesting strong climbing when isolated from Thomas group
rider_signals.PINO Thibaut: negative: second heartbreak sprint loss in 3 days from breakaway, questionable sprint positioning or timing twice in same week
rider_signals.BODZANA Filippo: positive: won stage in Italian champion jersey on home Veneto roads, outsprinted PINO who had beaten others days prior
